author: doge-liang
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Embed, preview, and edit draw.io diagrams directly in your notes.

manifest.author: doge-liang
manifest.description: Embed, preview, and edit draw.io diagrams directly in your notes.
manifest.name: Drawio

name: Drawio

releases.author: doge-liang
releases.description:
Plugin-review fix release.

- **No dynamic `<script>` injection in previews.** The bundled drawio viewer now runs via indirect eval in the page's global scope (identical semantics to a top-level script, no script element created), and drawio's sole external-script loader (an unused MathJax-from-CDN helper) is stripped at build time. This clears the two `createElement("script")` findings — previews fetch and execute no external code.

Verified in a real browser: the viewer loads, diagrams render to SVG at the correct size, and text labels (including CJK) are preserved.

releases.author: doge-liang
releases.description:
Review-round fixes.

- Don't detach the plugin's leaves in onunload (keeps the view's user-chosen location).
- Address Obsidian lint warnings (popout-window-safe globals, no unsafe any, etc.).
- Keep the settings tab on the supported display() API (compatible with the declared minAppVersion).
- Default to the bundled offline editor, with automatic fallback to the online diagrams.net editor when the webapp isn't installed.

Install: copy `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` into `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/drawio-editor/`. For the fully offline editor, see the README.

releases.author: doge-liang
releases.description:
Maintenance release for community review. Same features as 0.1.0; plugin id is `drawio-editor` consistently across the manifest, tag, and release assets.

Embed, preview, and edit draw.io (diagrams.net) diagrams directly in your notes. Online editor by default; offline and custom editor sources available in settings. Desktop only.

Install: copy `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` into `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/drawio-editor/`.

releases.author: doge-liang
releases.description:
First release.

Embed, preview, and edit draw.io (diagrams.net) diagrams directly in your notes.

- Code blocks (```drawio), standalone `.drawio` files (inline editor in the tab), and `![[file.drawio]]` embeds — rendered in both editing and reading views.
- Online editor by default (loaded from diagrams.net); switch to a bundled offline editor or a custom embed URL in settings.
- Diagrams stored as readable, uncompressed multi-line XML.
- Desktop only.

Install: copy `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` into `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/drawio/`. For the offline editor, see the README.
